sub_questions.question_text: (a) The ratio of cars to motorcycles sold at a garage is $5:7$. If a dealer sold $142$ more motorcycles than cars in a particular month, find the number of each type of vehicle sold.

(a) A cyclist sets out from a town $P$ on the bearing of $060^{\circ}$ to a town $Q$, $5\text{ km}$ away. He then moves on the bearing of $345^{\circ}$ to a town $R$, $6\text{ km}$ from $Q$.
i) Represent the information on a diagram,
ii) Calculate, correct to two decimal places
$\alpha$) $|PR|$;
$\beta$) The bearing of $R$ from $P$.
(b) The following are arranged in order of size $(x - 2), 4, (x + 2), (2x + 1)$ and $9$. If the median is equal to the mean, find the value of $x$.

(a) The average of refuse generated in a community in a week contains $35\%$ plastic, $27.5\%$ liquid, $17.5\%$ metal, $12.5\%$ vegetable matter and others $7.5\%$. Draw a pie chart to illustrate the information.
